name: Strait of Hormuz
escalation_triggers: Attack on commercial shipping or naval incident in the strait
War risk premium increase or insurer advisories for Persian Gulf calls
State threat to close or restrict transit

name: Red Sea / Bab el-Mandeb
escalation_triggers: Missile/drone attack on merchant vessel
Joint War Committee listed-area expansion
Major carriers suspending Red Sea transits (Cape rerouting)
capacity_notes: Rerouting via Cape of Good Hope adds ~10-14 days for Asia-Europe voyages.

name: Suez Canal
escalation_triggers: Grounding or blockage incident
Convoy schedule reduction or transit fee emergency change
capacity_notes: Convoy system; limited daily transit slots.

name: Strait of Malacca
escalation_triggers: Piracy/armed robbery incident cluster
Major collision or channel obstruction

name: South China Sea
escalation_triggers: Naval standoff or live-fire exercise closing shipping lanes
Typhoon season peak with multiple active systems

name: East China Sea
escalation_triggers: Typhoon warning affecting Yangtze delta ports
Military exercise notice closing sea areas

name: Taiwan Strait
escalation_triggers: Military exercise or exclusion zone announcement
Cross-strait incident affecting commercial transit

name: Bay of Bengal
escalation_triggers: Cyclone formation in pre/post-monsoon season
Port congestion spillover at Chittagong/Colombo

name: Panama Canal
escalation_triggers: Gatun Lake water level below draft threshold (dry season)
Daily transit slot reduction or auction premium spike
capacity_notes: Drought-sensitive; draft and slot restrictions typical in dry season (Jan-May).
